content.json:
This workbook reflects the machines that are reporting to a Log Analytics Workspace vs. the servers that are already onboarded Azure Arc or are Azure VMS.



The result table shows the **machines reporting** in any **Log Analytics** workspace that ARE NOT **Azure VMS**, NOR **Azure Arc Machines**.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize  arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by Resource
| project ResourceId, Resource, Category, ComputerIP, SCAgentChannel
| count
| extend Metric = "Log Analytics entries"

resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| extend ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type)
| count
| extend Metric = "Arc & Azure entries"

Heartbeat
| summarize  arg_max(TimeGenerated,*) by Resource
| project ResourceId, Resource, Category, ComputerIP, SCAgentChannel,TimeGenerated
| sort by Resource asc
content.title: Query Log Analytics for MMA

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| extend ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type)
| project id,name
content.title: Query Resource Graph for Machines

content.query: {"version":"Merge/1.0","merges":[{"id":"ffbd6be0-0895-45b7-81a1-99b7222b60bd","mergeType":"leftanti","leftTable":"Query - LA","rightTable":"Query Graph","leftColumn":"Resource","rightColumn":"name"}],"projectRename":[{"originalName":"ResourceId","mergedName":"ResourceId","fromId":"unknown"},{"originalName":"Resource","mergedName":"Resource","fromId":"unknown"},{"originalName":"Category","mergedName":"Category","fromId":"unknown"},{"originalName":"ComputerIP","mergedName":"ComputerIP","fromId":"unknown"},{"originalName":"SCAgentChannel","mergedName":"SCAgentChannel","fromId":"unknown"},{"originalName":"[Query - LA].ResourceId","mergedName":"Resource Id","fromId":"ffbd6be0-0895-45b7-81a1-99b7222b60bd"},{"originalName":"[Query - LA].Resource","mergedName":"Resource Name","fromId":"ffbd6be0-0895-45b7-81a1-99b7222b60bd"},{"originalName":"[Query - LA].Category","mergedName":"Category1","fromId":"ffbd6be0-0895-45b7-81a1-99b7222b60bd"},{"originalName":"[Query - LA].ComputerIP","mergedName":"ComputerIP1","fromId":"ffbd6be0-0895-45b7-81a1-99b7222b60bd"},{"originalName":"[Query - LA].SCAgentChannel","mergedName":"SCAgentChannel1","fromId":"ffbd6be0-0895-45b7-81a1-99b7222b60bd"},{"originalName":"[Query - LA].TimeGenerated","mergedName":"TimeGenerated","fromId":"unknown"}]}
content.title: Machines in Log Analytics but not in Arc nor in Azure VMs

parameters.name: DiscoveredExtensions
parameters.label: Discovered Extensions
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| extend ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type)
| distinct  ExtensionName
| where ExtensionName like "Linux"

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus == "Connected"
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType == 'linux'
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus
| extend OmsAgentForLinuxversion = (parse_json(ExtVersions)).OmsAgentForLinux, OmsAgentForLinux = (parse_json(ExtProvision)).OmsAgentForLinux
| project OmsAgentForLinux
| summarize count() by tostring(OmsAgentForLinux)
content.title: Oms Agent For Linux

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus == "Connected"
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType == 'linux'
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus
| extend DependencyAgentLinuxversion = (parse_json(ExtVersions)).DependencyAgentLinux, DependencyAgentLinux = (parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentLinux
| project DependencyAgentLinux
| summarize count() by tostring(DependencyAgentLinux)
content.title: Dependency Agent for Linux

parameters.name: ArcServerStatus
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| distinct ArcServerStatus

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus in ({ArcServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('linux')
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus
| extend OmsAgentForLinuxversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).OmsAgentForLinux), OmsAgentForLinux = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).OmsAgentForLinux),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).OmsAgentForLinux,"<blank>")
| extend DependencyAgentLinuxversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).DependencyAgentLinux), DependencyAgentLinux = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentLinux),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentLinux,"<blank>")
| where "{OmsAgentForLinuxStatus}"=="" or OmsAgentForLinux == "{OmsAgentForLinuxStatus:value}"
| where "{DependencyAgentLinuxStatus}"=="" or DependencyAgentLinux == "{DependencyAgentLinuxStatus:value}"
| count
| extend Metric = "Filtered Arc Servers"

resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus in ({ArcServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('linux')
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus
| extend OmsAgentForLinuxversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).OmsAgentForLinux), OmsAgentForLinux = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).OmsAgentForLinux),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).OmsAgentForLinux,"<blank>")
| extend DependencyAgentLinuxversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).DependencyAgentLinux), DependencyAgentLinux = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentLinux),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentLinux,"<blank>")
| extend AzureMonitorWindowsAgentversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).AzureMonitorWindowsAgent), AzureMonitorWindowsAgent = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).AzureMonitorWindowsAgent),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).AzureMonitorWindowsAgent,"<blank>")
| where "{OmsAgentForLinuxStatus}"=="" or OmsAgentForLinux == "{OmsAgentForLinuxStatus:value}"
| where "{DependencyAgentLinuxStatus}"=="" or DependencyAgentLinux == "{DependencyAgentLinuxStatus:value}"
| project ArcServer, ArcServerStatus, OSType,
OmsAgentForLinux,OmsAgentForLinuxversion,
DependencyAgentLinux,DependencyAgentLinuxversion,
AzureMonitorWindowsAgent,AzureMonitorWindowsAgentversion
| sort by OmsAgentForLinuxversion

content.query:
resources

| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus == "Connected"
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus == "Connected"
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId

| project MDEWindows

parameters.name: ArcServerStatus
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| distinct ArcServerStatus

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus in ({ArcServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus
| extend MicrosoftMonitoringAgentversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).MicrosoftMonitoringAgent), MicrosoftMonitoringAgent = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).MicrosoftMonitoringAgent),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).MicrosoftMonitoringAgent,"<blank>")
| extend DependencyAgentWindowsversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).DependencyAgentWindows), DependencyAgentWindows = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentWindows),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentWindows,"<blank>")
| extend MDEWindowsversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).['MDE.Windows']), MDEWindows = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).['MDE.Windows']),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).['MDE.Windows'],"<blank>")
| extend WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenterversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).['WindowsAgent.AzureSecurityCenter']), WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenter = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).['WindowsAgent.AzureSecurityCenter']),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).['WindowsAgent.AzureSecurityCenter'],"<blank>")
| extend OmsAgentForLinuxversion = (parse_json(ExtVersions)).OmsAgentForLinux, OmsAgentForLinux = (parse_json(ExtProvision)).OmsAgentForLinux
| extend DependencyAgentLinuxversion = (parse_json(ExtVersions)).DependencyAgentLinux, DependencyAgentLinux = (parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentLinux
| where "{MonitoringAgentStatus}"=="" or MicrosoftMonitoringAgent == "{MonitoringAgentStatus:value}"
| where "{DependencyAgentStatus}"=="" or DependencyAgentWindows == "{DependencyAgentStatus:value}"
| where "{DefenderForEndpointStatus}"=="" or MDEWindows == "{DefenderForEndpointStatus:value}"
| where "{QualysExtensionStatus}"=="" or WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenter == "{QualysExtensionStatus:value}"
| count
| extend Metric="Total of Servers filtered."

resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend
    JoinID = toupper(id),
	OSName = tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName),
    OSType = tostring(properties.osName),
    ArcServerStatus = tostring(properties.status)
| where ArcServerStatus in ({ArcServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter(
    resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
| where properties.type in ({Extensions})
| extend
        VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
		Version = tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion),
		Status = tostring (properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend ArcServer = id
| extend VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version)
| extend ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber),ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ArcServer, OSType, OSName, ArcServerStatus
| extend MicrosoftMonitoringAgentversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).MicrosoftMonitoringAgent), MicrosoftMonitoringAgent = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).MicrosoftMonitoringAgent),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).MicrosoftMonitoringAgent,"<blank>")
| extend AzureMonitorWindowsAgentversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).AzureMonitorWindowsAgent), AzureMonitorWindowsAgent = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).AzureMonitorWindowsAgent),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).AzureMonitorWindowsAgent,"<blank>")
| extend DependencyAgentWindowsversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).DependencyAgentWindows), DependencyAgentWindows = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentWindows),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).DependencyAgentWindows,"<blank>")
| extend MDEWindowsversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).['MDE.Windows']), MDEWindows = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).['MDE.Windows']),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).['MDE.Windows'],"<blank>")
| extend WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenterversion = tostring((parse_json(ExtVersions)).['WindowsAgent.AzureSecurityCenter']), WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenter = iff(isnotnull((parse_json(ExtProvision)).['WindowsAgent.AzureSecurityCenter']),(parse_json(ExtProvision)).['WindowsAgent.AzureSecurityCenter'],"<blank>")
| where "{MonitoringAgentStatus}"=="" or MicrosoftMonitoringAgent == "{MonitoringAgentStatus:value}"
| where "{DependencyAgentStatus}"=="" or DependencyAgentWindows == "{DependencyAgentStatus:value}"
| where "{DefenderForEndpointStatus}"=="" or MDEWindows == "{DefenderForEndpointStatus:value}"
| where "{QualysExtensionStatus}"=="" or WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenter == "{QualysExtensionStatus:value}"
| project ArcServer, ArcServerStatus, OSType,
MicrosoftMonitoringAgent,MicrosoftMonitoringAgentversion,
AzureMonitorWindowsAgent,AzureMonitorWindowsAgentversion,
DependencyAgentWindows,DependencyAgentWindowsversion,
WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenter,WindowsAgentAzureSecurityCenterversion,
MDEWindows,MDEWindowsversion //OmsAgentForLinux,OmsAgentForLinuxversion,DependencyAgentLinux,DependencyAgentLinuxversion
| sort by MicrosoftMonitoringAgentversion

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| summarize Count = count() by subscriptionId, resourceGroup
| order by Count desc
| extend Rank = row_number()
| project label = resourceGroup

parameters.name: Versions
parameters.label: Agent Versions:
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
| project agentversion = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
| distinct agentversion
| project version = extract(@"(\d+).(\d+)", 0, tostring(agentversion))

parameters.name: OperatingSystem
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
| where name like "{ServerName}"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend OperatingSystem = properties.osSku
| summarize count() by tostring(OperatingSystem)
| project OperatingSystem
| order by OperatingSystem

content.query:
let Monthtoname=(a:int){
case(a==1,"January",
     a==2,"February",
     a==3,"March",
     a==4,"April",
     a==5,"May",
     a==6,"June",
     a==7,"July",
     a==8,"August",
     a==9,"September",
     a==10,"October",
     a==11,"November",
     a==12,"December",
     "Error"
)
};
AzureARCAgentLatestVersion_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *)
| project extracted=parse_json(AgentLatestVersionHistory_s)
| mv-expand extracted
| project RawData=split(extracted,": ")
| extend tostring(YearMonth=RawData[0])
| extend tostring(Version=RawData[1])
| serialize N = row_number()
| extend VersionsUrl = "https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/agent-release-notes?WT.mc_id=Portal-fx"
| extend YearMonthToday = strcat (Monthtoname(datetime_part("Month",now())), " ", datetime_part("Year",now()))
| project N,YearMonth, Version,VersionsUrl,["_"] = iff( YearMonth == YearMonthToday, "New Version","")
content.title: Agent Version history:

content.json:
**Azure Connected Agent Release notes**: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/agent-release-notes

**Download latest agent version here**: https://aka.ms/AzureConnectedMachineAgent

content.query:
Resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where name like "{ServerName}"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend type = case(
type contains 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', 'Azure Arc enabled servers ',
strcat("Not Translated: ", type))
| extend OperatingSystem = properties.osSku
| where OperatingSystem in ({OperatingSystem})
| extend agentversion = properties.agentVersion, OperatingSystem = properties.osSku, Status = properties.status, lastStatusChange = properties.lastStatusChange
| extend agentversionshort = extract(@"(\d+).(\d+)", 0, tostring(agentversion))
| where agentversionshort in ({Versions})
| summarize count() by type

AzureArcServicePrincipalInfo_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *)
| project ServicePrincipalName=ServicePrincipalName_s,SecretCreationDate=SecretCreationDate_t,SecretExpirationDate=SecretExpirationDate_t,DaysRemaining = datetime_diff('day',SecretExpirationDate_t,now()),AppId = AppId_g

resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
| where name like "{ServerName}"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend agentversion = properties.agentVersion, OperatingSystem = properties.osSku, Status = properties.status, lastStatusChange = properties.lastStatusChange
| where OperatingSystem in ({OperatingSystem})
| extend agentversionshort = extract(@"(\d+).(\d+)", 0, tostring(agentversion))
| where agentversionshort in ({Versions})
| summarize count() by tostring(OperatingSystem)
| sort by OperatingSystem
content.title: Distribution of Serves by Operating System

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
| where name like "{ServerName}"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend agentversion = properties.agentVersion, OperatingSystem = properties.osSku, Status = properties.status, lastStatusChange = properties.lastStatusChange
| extend agentversionshort = extract(@"(\d+).(\d+)", 0, tostring(agentversion))
| where OperatingSystem in ({OperatingSystem})
| where agentversionshort in ({Versions})
| summarize count() by tostring(agentversion)
| sort by agentversion
content.title: Distribution of Serves by Agent Version

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
| where name like "{ServerName}"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend Status =  tostring(properties['status'])
| extend agentversion = properties.agentVersion
| extend OperatingSystem = properties.osSku
| extend agentversionshort = extract(@"(\d+).(\d+)", 0, tostring(agentversion))
| where OperatingSystem in ({OperatingSystem})
| where agentversionshort in ({Versions})
| summarize count() by Status
content.title: Status of 'Connected Machine' agent

content.query:
resources
| where type == "microsoft.hybridcompute/machines"
| where name like "{ServerName}"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend agentversion = properties.agentVersion, OperatingSystem = properties.osSku, Status = properties.status, lastStatusChange = properties.lastStatusChange
| where OperatingSystem in ({OperatingSystem})
| extend agentversionshort = extract(@"(\d+).(\d+)", 0, tostring(agentversion))
| where agentversionshort in ({Versions})
| extend LatestAgentVersion = {LatestAgentVersion}
| extend Updated = iff (agentversionshort == LatestAgentVersion,0,1)
| project lastStatusChange, Resource = id, OperatingSystem, Status, agentversion, Updated , Location = location, Subscription = subscriptionId, ['Resource group'] = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId, '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup)
| order by Resource
